title: Flueckigera
taxonomy: Flueckigera belongs to the family of fungi, specifically within the order and family of Trichocomaceae. The genus Flueckigera is a type of fungus that is known to be ascomycete. Flueckigera species are typically characterized as being saprotrophic.
